savingsTips.title: Simple ways to lower your bill
savingsTips.subtitle: Australian households can save hundreds each year with a few easy changes.

tips.title: Shift to off-peak
tips.description: Run your dishwasher, washing machine, and dryer during off-peak hours. Most networks charge less between 10pm and 7am.

tips.title: Optimise your air con
tips.description: Set your air conditioner to 24-26°C in summer. Each degree cooler adds about 10% to your cooling costs.

tips.title: Switch to LED lighting
tips.description: LED bulbs use up to 80% less energy than halogen downlights and last up to 25 times longer.

tips.title: Track with My Account
tips.description: Use My Account to see your daily usage and get personalised tips to save.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Join 1.6 million Australians making smarter energy choices.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: Switching was incredibly easy. I'm saving around 15% compared to my old provider, and I love that my plan is carbon neutral.

items.name: James R.
items.quote: The app is brilliant. I can see exactly when I'm using the most energy and shift things to off-peak. My bills have dropped noticeably.

items.name: Lisa T.
items.quote: The solar and battery bundle was exactly what we needed. Installation was smooth and we're already seeing savings on our quarterly bill.

cta.title: Ready to make the switch?
cta.subtitle: Join 1.6 million Australians who trust EnergyAustralia. Switching is quick and easy.

testimonials.title: What solar customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from Australian households already saving with solar and storage.

items.name: David L.
items.quote: Our electricity bills have dropped by about 40% since the panels went in. The battery means we barely use grid power in summer.

items.name: Maria S.
items.quote: The installation team was fantastic. Everything was done in a day and the monitoring app is really intuitive.

items.name: Raj P.
items.quote: With the battery, we have backup power during storms. It has completely changed how we think about our energy.

cta.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation quote and find out how much Australian sunshine could save you.

meta.title: Electric Vehicles - EnergyAustralia
meta.description: EV charging plans and solutions for Australian electric vehicle owners.

comparison.note: Based on 15,000 km/year. Actual costs depend on vehicle, electricity rates, and driving habits.

testimonials.title: What EV drivers say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from Australian customers who have made the switch to electric driving.

items.name: Tom H.
items.quote: Charging overnight on the EV plan costs me a fraction of what I used to spend on petrol. The home charger installation was quick and easy.

items.name: Anna W.
items.quote: We paired our EV with our solar panels and now most of our driving is essentially free. The app makes scheduling really simple.

items.name: Chen Y.
items.quote: The off-peak rates are excellent. I set the charger to start at midnight and wake up with a full battery every day.
